disclosure: full/noselect uses more data - reference only; fairness judgments vs same-budget random and same-budget baselines
text_view_status: text view excluded: QZ3 lane and text-controls lane still running; will be added once QZ3+controls close
pairing: all deltas are paired within the same seed (same pool, same noise realization, same fit_seed)

formulas.delta_vs_random_pp (acc/auc/f1): 100 * (metric_method[seed] - metric_random[seed]), paired within seed; positive = method better
formulas.delta_vs_random_abs (mase): mase_random[seed] - mase_method[seed], paired within seed; positive = method better (MASE reduction)
formulas.gap_vs_full_pp (acc/auc/f1): 100 * (metric_method[seed] - metric_full[seed]); full uses more data, reference only
formulas.gap_vs_full_abs (mase): mase_method[seed] - mase_full[seed]; positive = method worse than full; full uses more data, reference only
formulas.mean/std: sample mean and sample std (ddof=1) over the n=3 paired per-seed deltas
formulas.ci95: mean +- t_{0.975,df=2} * std / sqrt(3), t = 4.30265 (n=3 seeds)
